subject: english
title: Unit 8 Writing — Explain a Hobby (Fun with Paper / Origami)
subtitle: v1 · Leo's Hobby Planner Chart spine · 44 slides · Explanation Writing · Fun with Paper passage verbatim · 8 mini-games (no bundling) · buildFourColChart reused across 9 chart hosts · its/it's Be the Expert · 5-criteria Writing Rubric

content: Analyze a writing model (Fun with Paper).
Explain a hobby in writing using a 4-column planner chart.
Evaluate classmates' writing using 4 feedback frames.
language: Use the writing type Explanation: describe what a hobby is and how to do it.
Use example markers for example and such as to introduce specific examples.
Distinguish its (possessive) from it's (= it is).
Use the academic words definition, description, details to talk about writing.
Read the content vocab in context: origami, folding, design, dragon, crane.
